finance.summary: Market volatility continues as energy crises persist and end-of-quarter rebalancing begins; focus shifts to impending economic data releases.
highlights: Brent crude holds near $110/barrel amidst energy supply uncertainty
Money market inflows continue as a defensive pivot
Treasury yield curves invert, signaling continued recession concerns
Retail sector braces for softened consumer confidence

art.summary: As TEFAF Maastricht concludes, the art market transitions into the spring auction cycle; focus remains on historical valuation for blue-chip works.
highlights: TEFAF post-fair reports indicate strong interest in Old Masters
Spring auction houses announce major evening sale lineups
Yayoi Kusama retrospective continues to drive record attendance
Digital art sales show stabilization in mid-tier market segment
